expression.expression: CAST((CASE WHEN (CAST((SUBSTRING( v_AccountType, 1, 1)) AS string) = 'T') THEN 'Treaty' WHEN (CAST((SUBSTRING( v_AccountType, 1, 1)) AS string) = 'O') THEN 'FAC - External' ELSE 'Not RI Acct' END) AS string)
CAST((CASE WHEN CAST((`Trading Partner` IN ('111111', '222222')) AS BOOLEAN) THEN 'FAC - IPS' ELSE 'Blank' END) AS string)

in1.* EXCEPT(`Reinsurer`, `Account Type`, `Account Name`, `Account Branch`, `CRR`, `Deemed`, `Manual TZAC Map`, `FAC Account Type`, `Broker`, `Address 1`, `Address 2`, `Address 3`, `Postcode`, `GST No`)

CAST((CASE WHEN CAST((`Trading Partner` IN ('111111', '222222')) AS BOOLEAN) THEN 'FAC - IPS' ELSE 'Blank' END) AS string)
CAST((CASE WHEN ((`TZAC Code` IS NULL) OR ((LENGTH(`TZAC Code`)) = 0)) THEN `Manual TZAC Map` ELSE `TZAC Code` END) AS string)
CAST((CASE WHEN (v_TZAC = '') THEN 'Unallocated' ELSE v_TZAC END) AS string)
CAST((SUBSTRING( CAST(pPeriod AS string), 1, 4)) AS string)
CAST('Cube_Update_APRA Output from APRA ROL' AS string)
(CASE WHEN (in0.v_Reinsurer = in1.Reinsurer) THEN in1.`Share percent` ELSE NULL END)

in1.* EXCEPT(`Reinsurer`, `Account Type`, `Account Name`, `Account Branch`, `TZAC Code`, `CRR`, `Manual TZAC Map`, `FAC Account Type`, `Broker`, `Address 1`, `Address 2`, `Address 3`, `Postcode`, `GST No`, `Share percent`)

CAST((CASE WHEN CAST((`Trading Partner` IN ('111111', '222222')) AS BOOLEAN) THEN 'FAC - IPS' ELSE 'Blank' END) AS string)
